---
name: Design Contribution
about: Submit or propose a design contribution — illustration, animation, UI component, or icon
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: design
assignees: ''
---

## What are you contributing or proposing?

- [ ] Illustration
- [ ] Lottie animation
- [ ] Rive character / animation rig
- [ ] UI component
- [ ] Icon
- [ ] Something else

## Description

What is it, and where in the app does it go?

## Grade or pathway (if applicable)

Is this for a specific grade, pathway, or general app UI?

## Design guide compliance

Have you read [DESIGN_GUIDE.md](../DESIGN_GUIDE.md)? Does your contribution follow the colour system, typography, illustration style, and mascot guidelines?

- [ ] Yes — I've read the design guide and this work follows it
- [ ] Mostly — here's where it deviates and why:
- [ ] Not yet — I'd like feedback before finalising

## File format

- Lottie: .json
- Rive: .riv (please also include source file if possible)
- Illustrations: .png or .svg, max 200KB
- Icons: .svg, designed on 24×24 grid

## Attach your work

Attach files or link to a shared folder. For work in progress, screenshots or a short video are fine.

## Anything else?

Notes on your approach, things you're unsure about, or specific feedback you're looking for.
